message:
chore: close bead ft-3681t.9.4 (context budget observability)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2846,7 +2846,7 @@
 {"id":"ft-3681t.9.1","title":"[quality] Operator UX scenario validation and usability telemetry suite","description":"Build scenario-driven UX validation for operator workflows (launch, triage, intervention, approval, incident handling, migration oversight) with measurable efficiency/safety metrics.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Critical operator scenarios are executable end-to-end with pass/fail criteria.
2. UX telemetry captures friction, latency, error rates, intervention success, and accessibility regressions.
3. Findings feed backlog and release gates with explicit go/no-go thresholds.
4. Includes comprehensive unit/integration/e2e UX tests with detailed structured logs/artifacts.
Q1. [QUALITY-GATE] Add comprehensive unit tests covering happy-path behavior, edge cases, boundary conditions, and explicit failure/error paths for all touched logic.
Q2. [QUALITY-GATE] Add integration tests that validate cross-component contracts (mux/orchestrator/robot/policy/connectors as applicable), including at least one degraded-path scenario.
Q3. [QUALITY-GATE] Add deterministic end-to-end scenario scripts that exercise real workflows, including at least one failure-injection case and one recovery case.
Q4. [QUALITY-GATE] Emit detailed structured logs during tests and e2e runs with fields including timestamp, subsystem/component, correlation_id, scenario_id, inputs, decisions/actions, outcomes, and reason_code/error_code.
Q5. [QUALITY-GATE] Persist triage-ready artifacts (stdout/stderr, structured logs, snapshots/fixtures, benchmark outputs where relevant), document exact run commands and artifact paths, and run CPU-intensive cargo validation via rch.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:24:07.444033Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-02T20:02:06.304299Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["accessibility","operator","quality-gate","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:24:07.444033Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:40.065464Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:40.657487Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:41.220566Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:41.843863Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:42.382100Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:38:35.470733Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"ft-3681t.9.2","title":"[ux] Swarm command center dashboard and command palette parity+","description":"Deliver a swarm command center and command palette that is keyboard-first, policy-aware, low-latency under high event throughput, and ergonomically superior to NTM for daily fleet operations.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Command center covers core NTM operator workflows with equal or better speed/clarity.
2. Palette actions are policy-aware, state-consistent, and safely interruptible.
3. Live views remain accurate under high update throughput while meeting explicit interaction-latency budgets.
4. Accessibility and keyboard-only operation are first-class (navigation, contrast/readability, error recovery).
5. Includes comprehensive unit/integration/e2e UX tests and detailed structured logs/artifacts.
Q1. [QUALITY-GATE] Add comprehensive unit tests covering happy-path behavior, edge cases, boundary conditions, and explicit failure/error paths for all touched logic.
Q2. [QUALITY-GATE] Add integration tests that validate cross-component contracts (mux/orchestrator/robot/policy/connectors as applicable), including at least one degraded-path scenario.
Q3. [QUALITY-GATE] Add deterministic end-to-end scenario scripts that exercise real workflows, including at least one failure-injection case and one recovery case.
Q4. [QUALITY-GATE] Emit detailed structured logs during tests and e2e runs with fields including timestamp, subsystem/component, correlation_id, scenario_id, inputs, decisions/actions, outcomes, and reason_code/error_code.
Q5. [QUALITY-GATE] Persist triage-ready artifacts (stdout/stderr, structured logs, snapshots/fixtures, benchmark outputs where relevant), document exact run commands and artifact paths, and run CPU-intensive cargo validation via rch.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:24:08.367013Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-02T20:02:05.740100Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["accessibility","dashboard","operator","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.2","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:26:49.433299Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.2","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:26:56.022531Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.2","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:29.363209Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.2","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:30.148730Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.2","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.6.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:30.767396Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.2","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:24:08.367013Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"ft-3681t.9.3","title":"[ux] Session/workflow explorer with timeline replay and extraction tools","description":"Provide deep session/workflow exploration: timeline replay, diffing checkpoints, extracting key events/errors/actions, and linking directly into robot/workflow interventions.","acceptance_criteria":"1.
